prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0607ce86`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `0607ce86`. The rule is: detect the three dense horizontal block bands, infer the smallest repeated left-aligned tile by per-cell consensus across all copies, repaint those block rectangles with that clean tile, and clear everything else to black. I used the summary hint as a starting hypothesis and kept it because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or new `dsl_ext` primitive was needed.

`conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 0607ce86` passed `4/4` official examples, and `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 0607ce86 --n-examples 1000` produced the full artifact set. I also opened the generated preview sheet and it looks on-family: repeated block arrays, sparse off-block noise, and bounded internal corruption.
